1996October 6, 1996

🇨🇦 Toronto, Canada

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Toronto, Canada, October 6, 1996 -- October 16, 1996

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1996-10-toronto-canada

20 Resolutions

310Plenary
Approve replacing SC 4 Organization Handbook clauses 6.2 and 6.3
SC 4 approves replacing clauses 6.2 and 6.3 of the SC 4 Organization Handbook with the text found in ISO/TC 184/SC 4 N516.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
309Plenary
STEP ATSs shall not place additional requirements on AP implementors
STEP abstract test suites (ATSs) shall not place additional requirements on the implementors of application protocol (AP) parts. AP parts may however make normative references to an ATS and other c...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
308Plenary
Process technical SEDS reports and incorporate into ISO 10303
SC 4 requests the SC 4 Secretariat ensure these reports are made publicly available on SOLIS (SC 4 ON-Line Information Service), and incorporated into technical corrigenda, amendments, or new editi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
307Plenary
Thank Canadian hosts and US meeting sponsors
SC 4 thanks its Canadian hosts and US meeting sponsors: The Standards Council of Canada, National Research Council of Canada, and US PRO. Particular thanks go to Melanie Varn, Erinbeth Massie, Kris...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
306Plenary
Authorize preliminary project on Design and Configuration of Manufacturing Systems
SC 4 authorizes a preliminary stage 0 project on "Design and Configuration of Manufacturing Systems" and appoints Torsten Kjellberg as project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
305Plenary
Recognize cooperation between WG 2 and WG 10 on interoperability
SC 4 recognises this first successful step between WG 2 and WG 10 on a solution for the problem of interoperability between STEP (ISO 10303) and P-LIB (ISO 13584) within ISO/TC 184/SC 4 and encoura...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
304Plenary
Require AP documents to optionally include informative ARM annex
SC 4 requires that an AP document may have an informative annex containing a fully attributed EXPRESS specification of the ARM. An ARM implementation may be taken as validation evidence at DIS acco...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
303Plenary
Authorize preparatory work on extension of ISO 10303-21 capabilities
SC 4 authorizes preliminary (stage 0) work on the extension of capabilities of ISO 10303- 21 and appoints Neal Laurence and David Price as joint project leaders, and requests a statement of scope o...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
302Plenary
Cancel Project
SC 4 agrees to cancel Project #113, ISO 10303-13 "Architecture and methodology reference manual", and to redirect this work towards an SC 4 Standing Document and to the Part 1 amendment project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
301Plenary
Authorize preparatory work on Java programming language binding
SC 4 authorizes preparatory (stage 0) work on Java programming language binding to the Standard Data Access Interface specification and appoints Tom Rando as project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
300Plenary
Approve Phil Kennicott as convener of WG 12
SC 4 approves Phil Kennicott as the convener of WG 12, SC 4 Common Resources.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
299Plenary
Accept revised schedules for SC 4 projects
SC 4 accepts the revised schedules and justification, and reconfirms the continued standardization efforts for the following SC 4 projects: 10303-1DAM, 10303-34, 10303-106, 10303-215, 10303-216, 10...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
298Plenary
Recommend amending SC 4 organization handbook regarding Conveners
SC 4 recommends that the SC 4 organization handbook be amended as follows: "SC 4 Conveners and deputy conveners shall be nominated by the SC 4 P-members and shall serve for a maximum period of thre...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
297Plenary
Authorize preparatory work on Systems Engineering Data Representation
SC 4 authorizes preliminary (stage 0) work on Systems Engineering Data Representation and appoints Sylvain BARBEAU as project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
296Plenary
Cancel projects 10303-211 and 10303-311 due to lack of activity
SC 4 agrees to cancel project # 50, 10303-211, "Application protocol: Electronics test diagnostics and remanufacture" and project #78, 10303-311, "Abstract test suite: Electronics test diagnostics ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
295Plenary
Merge Parametrics project activities into ISO 14959 under WG 12
SC 4 notes that work under the Parametrics project (allocated the ISO number 14959) has identified areas which may require modifications to existing IRs, the preparation of a new IR or IRs, and the...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
294Plenary
Approve Handbook insertion and publish standing documents
SC 4 approves inserting the following into the SC 4 Organization Handbook for Clause 5.9: 5.9 Balloting Procedures 5.9.1 International Standards and Type II Technical Reports Balloting procedures f...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
292Plenary
Authorize temporary action for Quality Committee and amend Handbook
SC 4 authorises a temporary action to allow operation of the Quality Committee as outlined in ISO/TC 184/ SC 4 N483 (Rev 1) until the new pages are adopted by letter ballot.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
291Plenary
Endorse Petrotechnical Open Software Corporation as an A-liaison
SC 4 endorses the Petrotechnical Open Software Corporation (POSC) as an A-liaison to ISO/TC 184/SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 thanks Roberto Greening for his work as leader of the Parametrics project during the formative period.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
